text:
Once upon a time, there were two kittens. One day they found an old, broken toy mouse. They named it Olive.

They spent hours playing with Olive. Olive couldn't hold down mice. She couldn't even scratch them. But the kittens adored her.

They decided Olive deserved a home. They took turns looking after her. She became the most beloved toy mouse the kittens had ever known.

One day, while they were sleeping, Olive got stuck between their paw pads. The kittens worried—they couldn't hear her little mumbles. The next morning, she was gone. They mourned and searched for weeks. At last, they found her in a field, safe under a big bush.

They built her a cozy nest made of leaves and feathers.

Olive lived forever. They even had fifteen little mice descendants. One day, one of those mice was Olive II.

The kittens laughed and remembered their silly mouse forever. They never lost hope that maybe they could find a mouse lost just
